gold: Evet, ben zaten onun için aramıştım.
werNormalizedGold: evet ben zaten onun icin aramistim
sigWerNormalizedGold: evet ben zaten onun icin aramistim

sigWerErrors.reason: Omitting 'ben' (which means 'I' in Turkish) removes the subject of the sentence, which can change the meaning or make it less clear who is being referred to.
